description: Plugin-wide guardrails, hardened for GLOBAL (user-wide) install: these hooks fire on every session/edit, so each one self-gates to a real Recoup context and is a silent no-op everywhere else — the plugin stays invisible in unrelated projects. PreToolUse (protect-source-files.sh) only denies writes into deals/{deal-id}/source/ when that deal dir carries Recoup deal markers (assumptions.yaml / evidence-ledger.json / normalized / findings); a coincidental deals/*/source path in someone else's repo is allowed. SessionStart (check-env.sh) emits its connect/route directive only inside a Recoup workspace (RECOUP.md / .recoup / artists/*/RECOUP.md / deals or releases markers / a recoup-naming CLAUDE.md); otherwise it stays silent. The Stop completion/analyze gates are NOT plugin-wide — they live in each owning skill's SKILL.md frontmatter so Claude Code scopes them to that skill's lifecycle and they only fire when the skill is active: recoup-catalog-review-deal (deal completion + mid-workflow dashboard gate), recoup-content-make-video / make-graphics / asset-pack / reactive-post (analyze gate), and recoup-release-plan-rollout (release completion gate).
